reviews.review_description: Thanks, guys, It is a really good game! I love it. I would like to see more retro adaptations from you. I wish to buy it for money!

reviews.review_title: Brilliant game - you have to try!
reviews.review_description:
This is my favourite game on Quest2

Its a retro styled hover ship shooter. The view is essentially like looking into a dolls house, except its an alien cave where you need to fly your hover ship through levels collecting cargo (to take back to a home base) or racing through checkpoints.

Think of Gravity Force on the Amiga (if you are old enough)

The controls will take some people a little time to master, its not easy, but there is hours and hours of fun in this game for those who give it time.

This is a Fantastic Game with all the feelings of the Thrust genre of games but in a 3D World that only VR can do justice. Controls are simple but take a bit of time to master. Time to sit and chill with a Retro Classic. Thanks to devs for a nice break from all the usual destruction titles.

I love this game. Just planned on checking it out for a minute, and played for two hrs.  I used to play an indie game on vita that was very similar.  Well done dev, keep adding  :)  Also would love a level creator.

developer_response.body: Glad you like it, thanks. There is a link to the level editor on the game website, there is also an invite link to the Discord server where you can share your created maps, and talk about the game.

reviews.review_description: This game was done very well and for a free release game it is a lot of fun. It's hard to believe but I am having more fun with this than I have with games I have paid $30 for. Good work!
Good game ruined by terrible motion sickness.
Simply amazing. Few games actually lead me to feeling fully immersed, and this is one of them.  This developer knows how to create atmosphere in VR.
This game is very much fun. It’s reminiscent of Lunar Lander with an Asteroids flavor. I highly recommend.
Downloaded this on applab thinking nothing of it, then played it all night! Great concept and retro feel well done dev keep up the good work and I want more levels lol

Remember the old 1980s  arcade game moon lander that cost a quarter to play? No? Well my little young Vr maniacs,  let me give you a quarter so you can call the 1980s and find out! 

Your a moon lander that needs to navigate the harshness of gravity while piloting  your asteroids shaped ship through a maze while avoiding things that are shooting at you. Did I mention gravity?  

For free this game is f&(@ing fun!  Even looks better than the original game! How can you go wrong with this! 

I could throw my two cent suggestions but why? 

Developers do your thing. Whatever it is. I’ll be happy to see it. 

Everyone else just have fun! 

For the best experience every time you play a game put a quarter on the table and say out loud, I’m next!

Am I being punked, free?? There's a tons  levels and  reminds me of Hanna in the chopper 3 and that's my favorite game I played to date! Both free? Don't think twice about getting this addictive and challenging!! And I'm only on level 2 guys!! I love a challenge and thus definitely fits the bill. Keep it going developer! One thing tho I got frustrated caus the health ran out fast!! Lol
